历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11973 → 14281 → 14332 → 11948 → 30900. From 2021 to 2024, the science ranking fluctuated within the range of 11948–14332. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination subject grouping, the physics category "no further subject restriction" major group lowered the overall ranking to 30900, but the mainstream "further subject: chemistry" major group ranking was approximately 16930, showing an overall backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi was 102 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and 109 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 114, an increase of about 4.6% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, and the ranking numbers tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and campus safety public opinion. However, its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. The label of being the only 211 university for 100 million Henan people maintains high attention. The abnormal signal of the 2025 admission score line is high attention, with low-score admissions occurring in Heilongjiang and other places, which may have a complex impact on the following year's application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching the engineering major offerings of Zhengzhou University. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025. The reduction in candidate numbers slightly eases competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, adjacent to Shanxi, with strong regional proximity. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi is relatively stable, with the total enrollment in Shanxi in 2025 accounting for about 4.68%, which is at a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward shift of the 2025 physics category ranking due to the new college entrance examination grouping, the small enrollment expansion of 4.6% in 2026, the 3.4% decrease in total candidates, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, the competition landscape is generally stable with a slight easing. However, the high Douyin popularity and rising ranking increase attractiveness to high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will be approximately 31,450, with a range of 30,950–31,950.
